title: feat: dynamic balance-based request estimates in pricing table
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Counting your pollen
gist.blurb: The pricing table just got a lot smarter. Now when you're signed in, it automatically calculates exactly how many images or chats you can generate with your current pollen stash!
gist.summary: The pricing table now dynamically calculates and displays estimated request counts based on a user's actual balance when signed in.
gist.impact: Users can instantly see exactly how many generations they can afford across different models without doing any mental math.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a cute accountant, using a retro calculator or abacus to count glowing pollen. The scene should feel like a cozy shop counter or desk.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, happily typing on a chunky retro calculator on a wooden desk. Next to her, a small glass jar glows with bright lime green (#ecf874) pollen. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, happily typing on a chunky retro calculator on a wooden desk. Next to her, a small glass jar glows with bright lime green (#ecf874) pollen. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
